title: rubus discolor subsp. moestus
intro: Rubus discolor subsp. moestus is a lesser-known subspecies of the Rubus discolor plant, also known as the native blackberry, native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus discolor subsp. moestus include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Rubus discolor subsp. moestus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
